summary: Completed comprehensive testing of YABAI Gold-Hunter application. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in POST endpoints. All 23 backend API tests pass. All 9 frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not excluded after insert_one causing 500 errors
fixed.fix: Added doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one in all POST endpoints

issues: WITHDRAWAL_DESTINATION shows 'NOT SET' - this is expected per requirements as user hasn't configured it yet

critical_code_review_comments: All POST endpoints now properly exclude MongoDB _id before returning response
Watchdog self-healing loop runs every 60s as expected
Treasury tiered distribution (30%/5%/95%) logic is correctly implemented
All 3 swarm agents (Sentinel/Scraper/Janitor) are properly configured with their respective LLM models
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 5 timelines, 5 gold findings, 3 vault entries on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working. MongoDB ObjectId bug fixed. Treasury shows 'NOT SET' for destination which is expected. Net profit ~$487K from seed data + test runs. Watchdog running 60s health checks. Swarm agents in STANDBY mode.

backend: GET /api/treasury/status - tier, net_profit, destination, gas reserves ✓
frontend: Gold Hunter - 3 agent cards, Deploy Swarm button ✓
Treasury - tier status, distribution bar, 4 tabs ✓
Treasury Safety tab - gas reserves, circuit breaker ✓
Control Room - strike targets, email drafts ✓
